name: farmSim
description: Learn to code with Blockly in a farm

scripts.prod: npm run build && npx serve dist
scripts.pull: npm run pull:blockly && npm run pull:plugin && npm run pull:app
scripts.pull:blockly: cd ../blockly && git fetch upstream && git checkout codingcrops-changes && git pull
scripts.pull:plugin: cd ../blockly-keyboard-experimentation && git fetch upstream && git checkout add-screen-reader-support-experimental && git pull
scripts.pull:app: git fetch && git checkout master && git pull
scripts.build:blockly: cd ../blockly && npm install && npm run package
scripts.build:plugin: cd ../blockly-keyboard-experimentation && npm install && npm link blockly && npm run build
scripts.relink: npm run build:blockly && npm run link:blockly && npm run build:plugin && npm run link:plugin && npm install && npm link blockly @blockly/keyboard-navigation
scripts.pull-and-link: npm run pull && npm run build:blockly && npm run link:blockly && npm run build:plugin && npm run link:plugin && npm install && npm link blockly @blockly/keyboard-navigation

author: Jorene Ng
